data.title: Lombard Finance launches software development kit to support BTC staking services
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitcoin infrastructure developer Lombard Finance has launched a software development kit (SDK) that allows wallets, exchanges, and other platforms to provide one-click Bitcoin (BTC) staking services. The toolkit allows users to stake BTC to mint a liquid staking token called LBTC, and allows automatic deposits into Lombard's DeFi Vault, which currently has an annual yield of 3%. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Crypto Exchange Upbit Triggers Explosive Rally for Wallet-Focused Altcoin After Adding Support
data.description:
The South Korean crypto exchange Upbit has announced a new listing for a wallet-focused altcoin, triggering explosive price action. According to a new announcement, Upbit is supporting Wallet Connect (WCT) for trading over the Optimism (OP) network on its platform starting Wednesday.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/17/crypto-exchange-upbit-triggers-explosive-rally-for-wallet-focused-altcoin-after-adding-support/

data.title: Altcoin Season Delayed? Gensler Says Only Bitcoin Will Survive the Test of Time
data.description:
Bitcoin went up slightly to $84,312, and Ethereum also gained a bit to $1,596. The overall crypto market cap rose just a little to $2. 64 trillion
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/altcoin-season-delayed-gensler-says-only-bitcoin-will-survive-the-test-of-time/

data.title: BNB Chain TVL Incentive Program #5 has ended, and 5 projects have received delegated support
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, BNB Chain TVL Incentive Plan #5 has ended, and 5 projects have received delegated support, namely: KERNELDAO, ASTHERUS, YIELDNEST, TRANCHESS and LISTA-DAO.

data.title: Analysis: Deribit options market shows investors are not optimistic about XRP's near-term price action
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News XRP may be the next cryptocurrency to be listed on a spot ETF in the United States after Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH). However, the options market listed on Deribit is not optimistic, and put options linked to XRP have been higher than call options in multiple time periods. Put options typically provide insurance against price declines, and traders buy put options when they seek to hedge or profit from expected price declines. However, compared with Solana's SOL and other tokens, XRP's order book depth is relatively good, which means it can easily complete large order transactions at a stable price. (CoinDesk)

data.title: KSP's trading volume in the past 24 hours reached 7.445 million US dollars, ranking first in the AVE hot search list and BSC ecological trading volume ranking
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The KBSC ecosystem's AI sovereign DeFi protocol token KSP has a 24-hour trading volume of US$7.445 million, a market value of US$25 million, and 12,000 coin holding addresses, ranking first in the AVE hot search list BSC ecosystem transaction volume ranking.

data.title: DARK is currently trading at 0.03 USDT, with a maximum increase of 1135% after listing on Bitget Onchain
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: When DARK was launched on Bitget Onchain, its price was 0.0027013 USDT, and its highest price was 0.033384 USDT, with a maximum increase of 1135%. The latest price is 0.030292 USDT, and the increase has been 1021% so far.

data.title: VanEck to Launch NODE ETF to Offer Broad Exposure to Crypto-Related Stocks
data.description:
TL;DR VanEck is set to launch the NODE ETF on May 14, providing exposure to 30 to 60 stocks tied to the crypto ecosystem, including exchanges, Bitcoin miners, and data centers. NODE aims to democratize access to the sector without requiring direct purchase of digital assets. Despite SEC delays on other products, this ETF marks. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/vaneck-to-launch-node-etf-to-offer-broad-exposure-to-crypto-related-stocks/
